page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture GPU-accelerated server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with 16 vCPUs, operating at one thread per core without hyperthreading. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For hardware acceleration, this server includes a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. The instance does not feature any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using network-attached block storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU cores and dedicated GPU resource profile position this instance as an entry-level GPU option, balancing compute power and memory without the higher costs associated with larger accelerator models. This hardware configuration is suitable for workloads such as low-latency inference, video transcoding, lightweight machine learning model deployment, and parallel processing tasks that benefit from GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge is an x86_64 GPU-accelerated server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs with a single thread per core, paired with 64.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is provided by a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. This resource configuration makes the instance a cost-efficient option for entry-level GPU workloads. It is suitable for tasks such as lightweight machine learning inference, video transcoding, and parallel processing workloads that require dedicated CPU and GPU resources without the overhead of larger accelerator platforms.

tagline: A GPU-accelerated server featuring dedicated physical cores and an NVIDIA P4 accelerator for entry-level parallel processing and inference workloads.
